user.title: Connect to Zigbee2HASS Add-on
user.description:
Enter the host and port of the Zigbee2HASS add-on WebSocket API.

When running as a local HA add-on, use host **zigbee2hass** and port **8756**.

hassio_confirm.title: Zigbee2HASS Add-on Detected
hassio_confirm.description: The Zigbee2HASS add-on has been detected. Click Submit to configure the integration.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Zigbee2HASS
reconfigure.description: Update the host and port. Use **local_zigbee2hass** as the host when running as a local HA add-on.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Zigbee2HASS add-on. Make sure it is installed and running.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

permit_join.name: Permit Join
permit_join.description: Allow new Zigbee devices to join the network.

permit.name: Permit
permit.description: True to open the network, False to close it.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.description: Seconds to keep the network open (1-254).

ping_device.name: Ping Device
ping_device.description: Ping a Zigbee device and return its latency.

ieee_address.name: IEEE Address
ieee_address.description: The IEEE address of the device to ping (e.g. 0x00158d0001234567).

backup.name: NVRam Backup
backup.description: Trigger an immediate coordinator NVRam backup.

migrate_from_z2m.name: Migrate from Zigbee2MQTT
migrate_from_z2m.description: Import devices and coordinator backup from a Zigbee2MQTT data directory.

z2m_data_dir.name: Z2M Data Directory
z2m_data_dir.description: Path to the Zigbee2MQTT data directory (e.g. /share/zigbee2mqtt).

restart_addon.name: Restart Add-on
restart_addon.description: Restart the Zigbee controller in the add-on.
